def negative_subprocess_invoked_with_shell_true_and_user_derived_input():
    rule_id = "subprocess_invoked_with_shell_true_and_user_derived_input"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "subprocess called with shell=True and a command string that includes user-controlled data."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
